nasb.text: Then out of the smoke came locusts upon the earth, and power was given them, as the scorpions of the earth have power.

esv.text: Then from the smoke came locusts on the earth, and they were given power like the power of scorpions of the earth.

cnv.text: 有蝗蟲從煙裡出來到了地上；有能力賜給牠們，好像地上蠍子的能力一樣。

ccb.text: 有蝗虫从烟里飞出来，落到地上，有地上蝎子的能力赐给它们。

csbs.text: 有蝗虫从烟中出来，到了地上；它们被赐予了能力，就像地上的蝎子所具有的能力那样。
